chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-2935 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________________ HEARING OF CASE: 1. For order on office objection No.6. 2. For hearing of main case. ----------- Dated; 12th June 2024 Mr. Samiullah Soomro, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Saifullah, Asst. A.G. Sindh alongwith Inspector Safdar Ali from CTD and DSP Raza Mian on behalf of IGP Sindh, Karachi. -*-*-*-*-*- Learned AAG, under instructions, submits that instant petition can be disposed of while directing respondent No.4 to decide the petitioner’s departmental appeal within a short period of time. Accordingly, instant Constitutional Petition is disposed of with the direction to the petitioner to approach respondent No.4 while intimating the order of this Court, who shall decide his departmental appeal after providing an opportunity of being heard, preferably, within a period of four weeks from the date of receipt of this order, in accordance with law, rules and regulations. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE *Farhan/PS*
